title: Staff Software Development Engineer in Test
description:
**Job Description Summary**
 We are seeking a skilled Staff Software Development Engineer in Test to drive the high\\-quality component delivery of the Ethos Design System (EDS).
   

  

 The QA Engineer for EDS is the guardian of trust in the modern web platform. You are not just testing features; you are ensuring every “Lego block” is flawless and resilient. Your expertise in automation and validation guarantees Lit (Web Components) remain reliable across React, Angular, Typescript and Vue. Every test you design must be precise, accessible performant and it should work across components when integrated together.
   

  

**About EDS**
 EDS is the unified digital platform that powers GE HealthCare’s global software portfolio. It serves as a comprehensive library of reusable UI components, design patterns, and accessibility standards that bridge the critical gap between User Experience (UX) and Engineering. By fostering a philosophy of "reduce, reuse, and recycle," EDS enables hundreds of product teams to eliminate redundant coding and design work. We provide the foundational building blocks that ensure our clinical and operational applications are intuitive, consistent, and accessible, allowing teams to focus on patient safety.
   

  

 The Mission: Scale and Empowerment
   

  

 We are in a phase of hyper\\-growth, scaling from 15 adopting products to over 100\\. This requires a leader who thinks like a founder. You must look beyond simple backlog management to think about scale, growth, and empowerment. You will build a self\\-service ecosystem that allows teams to move fast without breaking the consistent standards required for patient safety and accessibility.
   

  

 GE Healthcare is a leading global medical technology and digital solutions innovator. Our mission is to improve lives in the moments that matter. Unlock your ambition, turn ideas into world\\-changing realities, and join an organization where every voice makes a difference, and every difference builds a healthier world.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Roles and Responsibilities**
* Automation Excellence: Design, develop, and maintain robust automation test suites using Playwright with Javascript/Typescript and BrowserStack to ensure scalable, repeatable validation.
* Cross‑Browser Consistency: Test EDS components across multiple browsers, devices, and screen resolutions to guarantee reliability and uniform user experiences.
* Comprehensive Testing: Conduct functional, performance, memory, and accessibility testing to validate stability, efficiency, and compliance with industry standards.
* Design System Compliance: Verify adherence to design system standards and UX guidelines, ensuring components meet usability and accessibility benchmarks.
* Collaborative Quality Assurance: Partner with cross‑functional teams to understand component behavior, align on requirements, and deliver high‑quality releases.
* Issue Analysis \\& Resolution: Diagnose and troubleshoot UI rendering issues across different browsers, providing clear defect documentation and collaborating with developers for efficient fixes.
* Continuous Improvement: Contribute to the evolution of testing processes, tools, and best practices to strengthen overall product quality and engineering efficiency.
* Team Mentorship: Actively mentor and coach QA engineers by fostering technical growth, guiding them through complex challenges, and helping resolve blockers. Provide hands\\-on support, encourage problem\\-solving, and cultivate a collaborative environment that empowers the team to deliver high\\-quality outcomes.


**Required Qualifications**
**Education Qualification**
 Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or “STEM” Majors (Science, Technology, Engineering and Math) with a minimum of 10\\+ years of experience in Software Quality Assurance and development, including 7\\+ years specializing in automation engineering
   

  

**Technical Stack**
**Mandatory**
* Expertise in JavaScript (ES6\\+) and TypeScript with Playwright
* Deep understanding of web components, DOM behavior, and browser rendering processes.
* Good communicator with proven ability to collaborate in cross‑functional teams.
* Skilled in accessibility testing using WCAG guidelines.
* Experienced in validating applications across diverse browsers and screen resolutions.
* Proficiency working in Agile environments and using Rally.
* Exposure to CI/CD and test integration.
* Experienced in testing design systems and reusable UI components
* Review of the PRs from peers and make sure for every userstory/defect the test covearge is available.
* Preferred: Leverage of BrowserStack within CI/CD pipelines to execute automated tests across multiple browsers and devices, ensuring consistent quality and reliability.
* Hands‑on testing expertise across Angular, React, Typescript and Vue.js frameworks


 Work Schedule : This role requires working with leadership in the United States (Central Time). You must be willing to work flexible hours to ensure significant overlap with US leadership and stakeholders for strategic planning and reviews.
   

  

**Inclusion and Diversity**
 GE Healthcare is an Equal Opportunity Employer where inclusion matters. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law.
   

  

 We expect all employees to live and breathe our behaviors: to act with humility and build trust; lead with transparency; deliver with focus, and drive ownership – always with unyielding integrity.
   

  

 Our total rewards are designed to unlock your ambition by giving you the boost and flexibility you need to turn your ideas into world\\-changing realities. Our salary and benefits are everything you’d expect from an organization with global strength and scale, and you’ll be surrounded by career opportunities in a culture that fosters care, collaboration and support.

title: Sr. Platform Reliability Engineer(Linux/AWS/GitOps/K8/Argo)
description:
**FICO (NYSE: FICO)** 
 is a leading global analytics software company, helping businesses in 100\\+ countries make better decisions. Join our world\\-class team today and fulfill your career potential!
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 "
 *Join our Platform Reliability Engineering (PRE) team to support a cutting\\-edge AWS\\-hosted solution, ensuring 99\\.9% uptime and exceptional user experience. As a Platform Reliability Engineer, you will work in a collaborative, agile environment with a global team spanning NORAM, EMEA, and APAC regions, contributing to follow\\-the\\-sun support operations.This role involves close collaboration and partnership across teams to deliver hands\\-on expertise in monitoring, troubleshooting, and automation—all with a focus on reliability, scalability, and performance optimization.* 
 "\\-Sr Director\\-DevOps Engineering
   

  

**What You'll Contribute**
* Design, deploy, and manage scalable cloud solutions on public cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
* Platform Support: Implement and maintain robust infrastructures using ArgoCD for GitOps and Crossplane/Terraform following established architectural designs and best practices.
* Deployment Execution: Execute and troubleshoot deployment strategies using ArgoCD for automated application delivery, ensuring smooth releases and rapid incident resolution.
* Infrastructure Operations: Operate and maintain cloud resources using Crossplane/Terraform, ensuring adherence to organizational standards and resolving configuration issues independently.
* Cross\\-team Collaboration: Partner with development, infrastructure, operations, and security teams to support infrastructure as code practices and resolve integration challenges.
* Knowledge Sharing: Share expertise and provide technical guidance to team members on GitOps, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure troubleshooting techniques.
* Process Enhancement: Identify opportunities to improve deployment processes and infrastructure operations, recommending optimizations based on operational experience.
* GitHub Operations: Support and maintain GitOps workflows by following established branching strategies, pull requests, and code review processes while troubleshooting workflow issues and ensuring adherence to team standards.
* Monitoring \\& Troubleshooting: Operate and maintain observability solutions to ensure platform performance, quickly diagnose issues, and implement remediation strategies.
* Execute infrastructure as code (IaC) deployments using tools like Terraform or Crossplane, troubleshooting deployment issues and maintaining existing configurations.
* Kubernetes Operations: Support and operationally maintain large Kubernetes clusters, handling day\\-to\\-day operations, scaling, and incident response with minimal escalation.
* Security: Experience with security tools like Wiz / OPA / Kyverno along with in\\-depth knowledge of security principles and frameworks.
* Participate in training sessions and workshops to continuously develop expertise in cloud technologies and operational best practices and the creation of incident runbooks.
* Apply established cloud architecture and design principles to solve complex operational challenges and support platform reliability.
* Communicate effectively with technical teams and stakeholders regarding incident status, operational metrics, and platform health.
* Stay current with emerging cloud technologies and operational tools to enhance platform support capabilities and operational efficiency.
* Drive operational excellence by identifying and implementing process improvements and proactive automation solutions that reduce incidents, minimize manual intervention, and enhance platform stability.


**What We’re Seeking**
* 10\\+ years of proven experience as a Senior DevOps Engineer or similar role with strong operational experience in a cloud\\-native environment, including extensive hands\\-on AWS experience
* Hands\\-on experience with ArgoCD w/Akuity and Crossplane in operational and support capacities.
* Experience with Istio service mesh for traffic management, security policies, rate limiting, and observability in microservices environments.
* Proven operational knowledge of Pulsar (StreamNative) for monitoring and troubleshooting streaming and event messaging workflows (e.g., topic congestion, consumer lag, event processing delays).
* GitHub Proficiency: Strong understanding of Git and GitHub workflows, including branching strategies and pull request management for operational tasks.
* Infrastructure as Code: Working experience with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools (e.g., Terraform and Crossplane) for deployment and troubleshooting.
* Advanced proficiency in C\\+\\+, Python, or Shell scripting with proven experience building complex automation frameworks, performance optimization tools, and sophisticated debugging solutions in production environments.
* Advanced Kubernetes (AKS) operational expertise (pod management, HPA/VPA scaling, resource optimization) and strong networking proficiency including VPC architecture design, DNS strategy implementation, load balancing optimization, and network troubleshooting across distributed systems.
* Strong working knowledge in network concepts and implementation on AWS (VPC, WAF, CloudWAN, etc.) for troubleshooting and operational support.
* Hands\\-on experience with observability, monitoring and logging tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack, Splunk, Cribl) for platform monitoring and troubleshooting.
* Experience with workflow and issue management tools such as JIRA/ ServiceNow.
* Team collaboration experience with the ability to work effectively within established team structures and provide technical guidance to peers.
* Nice\\-to\\-Have:
+ Experience supporting cell\\-based architecture designs in Kubernetes environments.
+ AWS certifications (e.g., DevOps Engineer, Solutions Architect Associate, SysOps Administrator).
+ Kubernetes certifications (e.g., Certified Kubernetes Administrator).
+ Experience with AIOps or Agentic AI tools and auto\\-runbooks for predictive reliability, automated incident response, and streamline operational workflows


**Our Offer to You**
* An inclusive culture strongly reflecting our core values: Act Like an Owner, Delight Our Customers and Earn the Respect of Others.
* The opportunity to make an impact and develop professionally by leveraging your unique strengths and participating in valuable learning experiences.
* Highly competitive compensation, benefits and rewards programs that encourage you to bring your best every day and be recognized for doing so.
* An engaging, people\\-first work environment offering work/life balance, employee resource groups, and social events to promote interaction and camaraderie.


**Why Make a Move to FICO?**
 At FICO, you can develop your career with a leading organization in one of the fastest\\-growing fields in technology today – Big Data analytics. You’ll play a part in our commitment to help businesses use data to improve every choice they make, using advances in artificial intelligence, machine learning, optimization, and much more.
   

  

 FICO makes a real difference in the way businesses operate worldwide:
   

  

* Credit Scoring — FICO® Scores are used by 90 of the top 100 US lenders.
* Fraud Detection and Security — 4 billion payment cards globally are protected by FICO fraud systems.
* Lending — 3/4 of US mortgages are approved using the FICO Score.


 Global trends toward digital transformation have created tremendous demand for FICO’s solutions, placing us among the world’s top 100 software companies by revenue. We help many of the world’s largest banks, insurers, retailers, telecommunications providers and other firms reach a new level of success. Our success is dependent on really talented people – just like you – who thrive on the collaboration and innovation that’s nurtured by a diverse and inclusive environment. We’ll provide the support you need, while ensuring you have the freedom to develop your skills and grow your career. Join FICO and help change the way business thinks!
   

  

 Learn more about how you can fulfil your potential at www.fico.com/Careers
   

  

 FICO promotes a culture of inclusion and seeks to attract a diverse set of candidates for each job opportunity. We are an equal employment opportunity employer and we’re proud to offer employment and advancement opportunities to all candidates without regard to race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, pregnancy, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. Research has shown that women and candidates from underrepresented communities may not apply for an opportunity if they don’t meet all stated qualifications. While our qualifications are clearly related to role success, each candidate’s profile is unique and strengths in certain skill and/or experience areas can be equally effective. If you believe you have many, but not necessarily all, of the stated qualifications we encourage you to apply.
   

  

 Information submitted with your application is subject to the FICO Privacy policy at https://www.fico.com/en/privacy\\-policy

title: Lead Software Engineer
description:
**An Amazing Career Opportunity for Lead Software Engineer – Java, Python**
**Location: Chennai, India (Hybrid)**
**Job ID: 44848**
**Profile Summary:**
 Lead SoftwareEngineer with experience in building enterprise grade web applications. Candidates should be familiar with “The Twelve Factor App”, continuous delivery concepts and “Cloud Native Applications”.
   

  

**About HID Global**
 HID Global powers the trusted identities of the world’s people, places and things. We make it possible for people to transact safely, work productively and travel freely. Our trusted identity solutions give people secure and convenient access to physical and digital places and connect things that can be accurately identified, verified and tracked digitally. Millions of people around the world use HID products and services to navigate their everyday lives, and over 2 billion things are connected through HID. We work with governments, educational institutions, hospitals, financial institutions, industrial businesses, and some of the most innovative companies on the planet. Headquartered in Austin, Texas, HID Global has over 4500 employees worldwide and operates international offices that support more than 100 countries. HID Global® is an ASSA ABLOY Group brand. HID Global has is the trusted source for secure identity solutions for millions of customers and users around the world. In India, we have two Engineering Centre (Bangalore and Chennai). Global Engineering Team is based in Chennai and one of the Business Unit Engineering team is based in Bangalore. Check us out: www.hidglobal.com and https://youtu.be/23km5H4K9Eo
   

  

 LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/company/hidglobal/mycompany/
   

  

**Physical Access Control Solutions (PACS):**
 HID Physical Access Control Solutions (PACS) is at the forefront of securing spaces with advanced, reliable access control solutions. From cutting\\-edge readers, credentials and controllers to mobile and biometric technologies, HID PACS empowers organizations worldwide to protect their people, property and assets with scalable, high\\-quality solutions. This is more than just a job – it’s your chance to join an industry leader to drive innovation in access control and make a real impact on global security solutions. Are you ready to make a difference? Join us and help shape the future of security.
   

  

**Are You Ready to Join the Team?**
 Our company is committed to finding the best and the brightest talent to help us reach the top. If you are a dynamic, highly skilled, experienced Cloud engineer and technology enthusiast, and you enjoy working in a rapid pace within a rapidly growing business environment, then you will want to consider this position. If you excel at communication, collaboration, and unrelenting innovation, we want to talk to you. And if you bring dedication, positive energy and integrity to the table, you just might be the right fit for our team.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 To perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each essential duty satisfactorily. The requirements listed below are representative of the knowledge, skill, and/or ability required. Reasonable accommodation may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions.
   

  

**Roles \\& Responsibilities (Other Duties May Be Assigned)**
 Building new Cloud Applications
   

  

* Assume responsibility for the full lifecycle of your code, from implementation to testing to user acceptance to deployment
* Build and own applications for Amazon AWS
* Developing pure cloud, and\\-or hybrid cloud solutions
* Develop an application framework for manipulating form data with complex dependencies
* Write test\\-driven, maintainable code and follow industry standards and web development best practices
* Gather requirements and create technical specifications as needed
* Implement new features and maintain existing features of production pipeline
* Work with architects, project managers and other engineers to assure accurate timelines and deliverables
* Collaborate with fellow engineers to find elegant, long\\-term solutions as well as creative quick fixes to problems
* Develop and maintain microservices deployed to Amazon AWS cloud with Docker
* Develop Java code using Spring frameworks
* Develop Python code
* Expose REST APIs
* Document code and create high\\-level interaction diagrams

title: Digital Twin Platform Developer
description:
We are looking for an experienced Digital Twin Platform Developer to architect and build high\\-fidelity virtual replicas of physical systems \\- spanning industrial environments, smart infrastructure, and connected products. You will integrate real\\-time IoT telemetry, 3D visualization engines, physics simulation, and AI\\-driven analytics into a unified, scalable Digital Twin platform used by engineers, operators, and business stakeholders.
 



**About the Role** 


 The Digital Twin Platform Developer will take end\\-to\\-end ownership of designing, building, and evolving our Digital Twin ecosystem. This is a cross\\-disciplinary, high\\-impact role sitting at the intersection of software engineering, industrial systems, real\\-time data, 3D visualization, and AI/ML \\- making it one of the most technically diverse positions in the organisation.
 





 You will collaborate closely with engineering, design, hardware and product teams, to ensure that digital replicas of physical assets are accurate, real\\-time, interoperable, and visually actionable for end users.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 

**1\\. Digital Twin Architecture \\& Platform Development** 



* Design and implement the core Digital Twin platform architecture \\- defining data models, synchronisation logic, state management, and API layers
* Build real\\-time bidirectional data bridges between physical assets and their digital counterparts using MQTT, OPC\\-UA, AMQP, or REST
* Develop modular, scalable microservices for twin lifecycle management: creation, update, versioning, and retirement of digital models
* Define and enforce platform\\-wide standards for twin schema, metadata, and interoperability across asset classes



**2\\. 3D Visualization \\& HMI Interface Development** 



* Build immersive 3D visualization environments using Unity, Unreal Engine, or web\\-based renderers (Three.js, Babylon.js, CesiumJS)
* Develop interactive HMI dashboards that overlay real\\-time telemetry onto 3D asset models with alerts, KPIs, and drill\\-down views
* Collaborate with UI/UX designers to ensure operator\\-facing interfaces are intuitive, accessible, and aligned with industrial UX standards
* Integrate CAD/BIM model imports (IFC, STEP, FBX, glTF) and automate geometry pipeline from engineering tools to the Twin platform



**3\\. IoT \\& Sensor Data Integration** 



* Design and build data ingestion pipelines from edge devices, PLCs, SCADA systems, and IoT sensors into the Digital Twin platform
* Implement real\\-time stream processing using Apache Kafka, AWS Kinesis, or Azure Event Hub for high\\-frequency telemetry data
* Develop edge\\-to\\-cloud data normalization, validation, and compression routines to ensure data quality and cost efficiency
* Manage device registry, twin provisioning, and OTA update pipelines for connected physical assets



**4\\. Physics Simulation \\& Predictive Modelling** 



* Integrate physics simulation engines (Simulink, OpenModelica, Ansys Twin Builder) into the platform for behaviour replication
* Develop and embed AI/ML models for predictive maintenance, anomaly detection, and remaining useful life (RUL) estimation
* Implement what\\-if scenario simulation modes enabling operators to test interventions on the digital twin before physical execution
* Calibrate and validate digital twin fidelity against real\\-world sensor data and engineering performance benchmarks



**5\\. Cloud, Security \\& DevOps** 



* Deploy and maintain the Digital Twin platform on cloud infrastructure: AWS IoT TwinMaker or Azure Digital Twins
* Design role\\-based access control (RBAC), data encryption, and secure device authentication across the twin ecosystem
* Build CI/CD pipelines, containerise platform services with Docker/Kubernetes, and automate infrastructure with Terraform
* Monitor platform health, uptime, latency, and data freshness using Grafana, Prometheus, or cloud\\-native observability stacks


**Required Qualifications \\& Experience** 

**Education** 



* B.Tech / B.E. / M.Tech in Computer Science, IT, Electronics, Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics, or related field
* Candidates with relevant certifications and demonstrable project portfolios will be equally considered



**Core Experience (3 – 7 Years)** 



* 3\\+ years of hands\\-on experience in IoT platform development, industrial automation, or smart systems engineering
* Demonstrated experience building or contributing to a Digital Twin, SCADA, BIM, or industrial simulation platform
* Proven ability to work with real\\-time data pipelines and event\\-driven architectures at scale
* Strong software engineering fundamentals: system design, RESTful APIs, microservices, containerisation, and cloud deployment



**Technical Expertise** 



* Proficiency in Python and/or C\\+\\+ for backend services and simulation integration
* Hands\\-on experience with at least one 3D engine or visualization framework: Unity, Unreal, Three.js, or Babylon.js
* Working knowledge of industrial protocols: OPC\\-UA, MQTT, Modbus, PROFINET, or BACnet
* Experience with cloud IoT platforms: AWS IoT TwinMaker, Azure Digital Twins, or Siemens MindSphere
* Exposure to Nvidia Omniverse
* Solid understanding of data modelling, DTDL (Digital Twin Definition Language), or WoT (Web of Things) specifications


**Preferred Qualifications** 
* Experience with physics simulation tools: Ansys Twin Builder, Simulink, or OpenModelica
* Knowledge of AI/ML frameworks for predictive analytics: TensorFlow, PyTorch, or Scikit\\-learn
* Familiarity with BIM standards (IFC, Revit) or geospatial platforms (CesiumJS, ArcGIS) for large\\-scale infrastructure twins
* Exposure to digital thread concepts, PLM systems (Teamcenter, Windchill), or MES integration
* Experience with AR/VR platforms (HoloLens, Meta Quest, WebXR) for immersive twin interaction
* Industry certifications: AWS IoT Specialty, Azure IoT Developer, or Siemens MindSphere Developer


**How to Apply** 


 We encourage applications from engineers who are passionate about building the future of connected physical\\-digital systems. Please submit the following:
 



* Updated Resume / CV highlighting relevant Digital Twin, IoT, or simulation experience
* Portfolio or project links — GitHub, demos, live platforms, or publications
* Brief cover letter (max 400 words) describing your most impactful Digital Twin or IoT project
* Any relevant certifications, patents, or conference contributions
* Write to us at
 
 info@emkionyx.com

It is the digital market leader in Singapore and has won numerous awards for marketing, customer service, and innovative product offerings beyond connectivity.
* Circles Aspire: A global provider of Communications Platform\\-as\\-a\\-Service (CPaaS) solutions. Its cloud\\-based Experience Cloud platform enables enterprises, service providers and developers to deliver and scale mobile, messaging, IoT, and connectivity services worldwide.

**Standardized Job Title: Staff Software Engineer**
**Role: Staff Engineer — AI Platform**
**Location: Bangalore**
**Role Summary**
**Leads the design and implementation of AI \\& CXOS systems. Owns critical technical decisions within the AI \\& CXOS platform, drives best practices, and provides hands\\-on technical leadership. Bridges the gap between architectural vision and implementation, ensuring AI \\& CXOS systems are production\\-ready and maintainable. Expected to learn and adapt quickly as AI tools and best practices evolve.**
****Key Responsibilities****
* Build new features, enhance existing ones, and support them in production, focusing on the AI platform.
* Build reusable libraries or technology platforms that address multiple use cases.
* Work closely with Engineers to develop the best technical design, strategy, and drive execution to build capabilities into the platform.

* Own the delivery of various timelines, ensuring that key milestones are met and deliveries are of the highest quality.
* Establish and encourage the adoption of software development best practices across the team and the organization.
* Collaborate with non\\-technical stakeholders such as Product Managers, Designers, and Marketing.

* Deploy and maintain enterprise\\-class RESTful web services.
* Own the engineering excellence and operational readiness of the service, driving the SLO, SLI, and SLA of the relevant services.
* Take ownership to drive quality via integration and unit test coverage.
* Dive deep into each issue, own reactive fixes, and execute long\\-term fixes, assisting other Support Engineers on complex RCA issues.
* Provide technical mentoring and L3 engineering support to other engineers.


****Core AI \\& ML Skills****
* AI System Design
+ Design and implement AI workflows and agent architectures using frameworks like LangGraph.
+ Build production\\-grade RAG systems with appropriate chunking, retrieval, and response generation.
+ Design conversation management with context handling, session state, and error recovery.
+ Architect customer\\-facing AI features with proper validation, fallbacks, and graceful degradation.
+ Implement tool orchestration patterns for connecting LLMs to existing APIs and services.

* LLM Integration
+ Production implementation of LLM APIs with retry logic, fallbacks, and rate limit handling.
+ Practical prompt engineering: system prompts, few\\-shot learning, structured outputs (JSON mode).
+ Implement evaluation approaches for AI output quality (automated checks, regression testing).
+ Optimize token usage and manage API costs effectively.
+ Awareness of prompt versioning and systematic iteration practices.

* Data Pipelines for AI
+ Build data ingestion pipelines for AI systems (document processing, embedding generation).
+ Implement vector storage and retrieval workflows for RAG and search use cases.
+ Design feedback loops from production AI usage back to improvement cycles.
+ Basic data quality practices for AI inputs (validation, cleaning, deduplication).

* AI Safety \\& Quality
+ Implement input validation and output filtering for production AI systems.
+ Build or integrate content safety layers (keyword filters, classifier\\-based detection).
+ Design guardrails that balance safety with usability (avoiding over\\-blocking).
+ Implement logging and auditing for AI interactions to support compliance and debugging.


****Core Backend \\& Platform Engineering****
* Backend Engineering
+ Strong proficiency in Go, Node.js, or Java microservices.
+ Design and optimize high\\-throughput APIs for production workloads.
+ Database experience: SQL (PostgreSQL), NoSQL (Redis, MongoDB), and familiarity with vector stores.
+ Event\\-driven architecture: Kafka, message queues, or streaming patterns.

* Infrastructure \\& DevOps
+ Container orchestration (Kubernetes), CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure as code.
+ Performance profiling and optimization for API\\-heavy workloads.
+ Cloud services: AWS/GCP compute, storage, and relevant AI services.


****AI Concepts \\& Knowledge****
* Must Know
+ How LLMs generate responses: tokens, probabilities, context windows, and temperature.
+ Embeddings: what they are, how to choose embedding models, and similarity search basics.
+ RAG fundamentals: indexing strategies, retrieval methods, and when RAG is the right approach.
+ Agent patterns: tool use, function calling, multi\\-step reasoning, and when to use agents vs. simple chains.
+ Prompt engineering practices: chain\\-of\\-thought, few\\-shot, structured outputs, and systematic testing.
+ AI safety basics: prompt injection, jailbreaking, and practical mitigation approaches.
+ Awareness of fine\\-tuning concepts and when fine\\-tuning might be considered over prompt\\-based solutions.


****Tools \\& Platforms****
* Required
+ LangGraph / LangChain for agent and workflow building.
+ Claude SDK / OpenAI SDK for API integration.
+ At least one vector database in practice (pgvector, Pinecone, Weaviate, or similar).
+ AI observability tools (LangSmith, LangFuse) for tracing and debugging.
+ AI workflow platforms for rapid prototyping.
+ Python for AI scripting and prototyping.
+ MCP or equivalent tool integration patterns.


****Mindset \\& Soft Skills****
* Required
+ Strong problem\\-solving: breaks down ambiguous AI problems into concrete, implementable tasks.
+ Independent researcher: reads documentation and experiments before escalating.
+ Good debugging skills across LLM calls, embeddings, retrieval, and API integrations.
+ Mentoring ability: can teach AI concepts and patterns to less experienced team members.
+ Clear technical writing for design docs and runbooks.
+ Comfortable with rapid iteration: AI solutions often require experimentation over upfront specification.
+ Quick learner who actively keeps up with the evolving AI landscape.


**Experience And General Requirements**
* Around 10\\+ years of experience in software development of which 2 years are lead experience.
* Strong design and architectural experience in building various highly\\-scalable and highly\\-available products.
* Strong understanding of the SDLC Activities which include Analysis, Design, Development, Testing, Deployment and Post\\-Production Support etc..
* Deep Dive, problem\\-solving, RCA and systematic thinking to reach the cause of issues.
* Able to work independently and multi\\-task effectively.
* Program at a system level and able to manage service stability.
* Excellent experience maintaining scalable, extensible code.
* Methodical in maintaining up to date documentation.
* Metric\\-driven mindset and obsessive about ensuring clean coding practices.

title: Senior Forecasting and ML Engineer
description:
Fluence (Nasdaq: FLNC) is a global market leader delivering intelligent energy storage and optimization software for renewables and storage. Our solutions and operational services are helping to create a more resilient grid and unlock the full potential of renewable portfolios. With gigawatts of successful implementations across nearly 50 markets, we are transforming the way we power our world for a more sustainable future. For more information, please visit fluenceenergy.com.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Senior Forecasting and ML Engineer
   

  

 Location: Bangalore, India
   

  

**About Fluence**
 Fluence, a Siemens and AES company, is a global market leader in energy storage products and services, and digital applications for renewables and storage. The company has deployed and contracted 46 GWh of energy storage across 273 projects in 48 markets worldwide. Across its portfolio of AI\\-enabled software applications, Fluence optimizes 34 GW of renewable and storage assets globally. Within this portfolio, Fluence Mosaic™ provides intelligent, automated bidding and trading solutions for energy storage and renewable assets, with 16 GW of assets deployed or awarded, helping customers increase energy and ancillary service revenues while reducing risk. Through its products, services, and advanced software platforms, Fluence is helping customers build more resilient electric grids and accelerate the transition to a more sustainable energy future. To learn more about Fluence, please visit: fluenceenergy.com.
   

  

**OUR CULTURE AND VALUES**
 We are guided by our passion to transform the way we power our world. Achieving our goals requires creativity, diversity of ideas and backgrounds, and building trust to effect change and move with speed.
   

  

 We are Leading
   

  

 Fluence has deployed and contracted 46 GWh of energy storage globally and optimizes 34 GW of renewable and storage assets through its AI\\-enabled software platforms, including 16 GW managed by Mosaic™ automated trading solutions.
   

  

 We are Responsible
   

  

 Fluence is defined by its unwavering commitment to safety, quality, and integrity.
   

  

 We are Agile
   

  

 We achieve our goals and meet our customers’ needs by cultivating curiosity, adaptability, and self\\-reflection in our teams.
   

  

 We are Fun
   

  

 We value the diversity in thought and experience of our coworkers and customers. Through honest, forthcoming, and respectful communications we work to ensure that Fluence is an inclusive and welcoming environment for all.
   

  

**About The Position**
 This position will sit within the MOSAIC teams, part of the Global Innovation and Delivery (GID) organization. MOSAIC is Fluence’s algorithmic bidding and trading software platform, leveraging artificial intelligence, advanced price forecasting, portfolio optimization, and automated market bidding to enable energy storage and flexible generation assets to participate optimally in wholesale electricity markets.
   

  

 As a
 **Senior** 
**Forecasting and Machine Learning Engineer,** 
 you will provide technical expertise and collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to advance the forecasting capabilities within our market\\-leading optimization and bidding product, Mosaic, designed for renewable energy and battery storage assets in global electricity markets. You will identify impactful initiatives, address challenges proactively, and drive key projects to successful completion. In addition, you will contribute to mentoring and supporting the growth of team members within the Forecasting team.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities Include**
* Experience: 5\\+ years of industry experience developing forecasting models, preferably for energy systems and electricity markets.
* Forecasting Model Development: Design, develop, deploy, and maintain advanced statistical and machine learning models for time series forecasting, with applications in demand, price, and renewable energy prediction. Incorporate probabilistic scenario generation to characterize uncertainty in forecasts.
* Advanced Forecasting Techniques: Leverage ensemble\\-based forecasting methods and develop self\\-correcting models of models that iteratively improve forecast accuracy by dynamically integrating feedback and error correction mechanisms.
* Uncertainty Characterization: Implement stochastic processing models to generate probabilistic forecast scenarios that characterize uncertainty in time series data.
* Multivariate Time\\-Series Modeling and Dependence Structure Analysis: Implement advanced stochastic modeling frameworks to capture the dependence structure of temporal and spatial correlations in time\\-series data across a sequence of markets, ensuring realistic scenario generation that reflects the complex relationships and dynamics within and between markets.
* Analyzing Electricity Market Dynamics: Conduct in\\-depth analyses of electricity market trends to decipher the evolution of market forces and identify shifting dynamics that influence price formation for energy and ancillary services. Leverage this understanding to refine forecasting models and strategic decision\\-making.
